title: D&D 2024 Species
description: Schema for D&D 2024 base species JSON files in data/species/. Species describe a creature's intrinsic anatomy, size, speed, traits, and granted languages. Per D&D 2024 rules species do NOT carry ability score increases (those moved to backgrounds).

darkvision.description: Legacy convenience field for sheet rendering; the canonical grant is the grant_darkvision effect on the relevant trait.

lineages.description: Names of species_variants files (under data/species_variants/) that derive from this species.
